tech: C#, SQL Server Local DB, Windows Forms
title: Tuition Management System
description: A desktop application for managing tuition center operations including student information, fee collection, and batch management. Built with C# Windows Forms and SQL Server Local DB for offline data storage.

images.title: Dashboard Overview
images.desc: Main dashboard showing tuition management analytics and student statistics.

images.title: Student Management
images.desc: Manage student profiles, attendance, and academic records.

images.title: Fee Collection
images.desc: Track fee payments, dues, and generate receipts for students.

images.title: Batch Management
images.desc: Organize students into batches and schedule classes efficiently.
